chemicalId.description: Stable suite-level chemical identifier used across MCP boundaries.
chemicalId.title: Chemicalid

preferredName.description: Preferred human-readable chemical name for cross-MCP handoffs.
preferredName.title: Preferredname

casrn.description: CAS Registry Number when available for reconciliation or review.
casrn.title: Casrn

smiles.description: Canonical or representative SMILES string when available.
smiles.title: Smiles

inchiKey.description: InChIKey when available for downstream identity reconciliation.
inchiKey.title: Inchikey

externalIdentifiers.description: Additional external identifiers preserved verbatim for auditability.
externalIdentifiers.title: Externalidentifiers

notes.description: Additional identity notes that should remain attached to handoffs.
notes.title: Notes

medium.description: Target release medium, for example air, water, soil, or sediment.
medium.title: Medium

fraction.description: Fraction of the release allocated to the named medium.
fraction.title: Fraction

releaseScenarioId.description: Stable identifier for the environmental release scenario.
releaseScenarioId.title: Releasescenarioid

chemicalIdentity.description: Normalized chemical identity preserved across MCP boundaries.

sourceTermType.description: Whether the release is expressed as a one-time mass or an emission rate.
sourceTermType.title: Sourcetermtype

releaseMassMg.description: Released mass when the source term is expressed as a finite mass.
releaseMassMg.title: Releasemassmg

emissionRateMgPerHour.description: Emission rate when the source term is expressed as a release rate.
emissionRateMgPerHour.title: Emissionratemgperhour

releaseDurationHours.description: Duration of the release window in hours.
releaseDurationHours.title: Releasedurationhours

timingPattern.description: Human-readable timing pattern such as one-time, episodic, or seasonal.
timingPattern.title: Timingpattern

regionScope.description: Region or site scope used for the future fate handoff.
regionScope.title: Regionscope

siteContext.description: Optional site or setting label such as residential fringe or warehouse.
siteContext.title: Sitecontext

releaseMediaFractions.description: Media-fraction ledger for the environmental release scenario.
releaseMediaFractions.title: Releasemediafractions

treatmentOrRemovalFraction.description: Optional treatment or removal fraction applied before environmental entry.
treatmentOrRemovalFraction.title: Treatmentorremovalfraction

evidenceSources.description: Upstream evidence references backing the release scenario.
evidenceSources.title: Evidencesources

notes.description: Additional notes that should remain attached to the release scenario.
notes.title: Notes
